name: Gibbering Mouther
effect: Deploy 2 troops, then choose an opponent with a troop adjacent to at least 1 of them. He or she recruits an Insane Outcast.
flavour: “If you're trying to make sense of what they're saying, you're already mad.” —Lippo, derro sage

name: Night Hag
effect: Choose one:
• Place a spy.
• Return one of your spies ▶ Draw 2 cards.
flavour: Singing a merry song, she sows the seeds of madness.

name: Mind Flayer
effect: Devour a card in your hand ▶ Choose one:
• +3 influence
• Assassinate a troop.
flavour: “You know what goes on in their minds? Filthy, stinking evil. That's what.” —Hitch, rogue extraordinaire

name: Myconid Adult
effect: +2 influence
Choose an opponent. He or she recruits an Insane Outcast.
flavour: “Rejoice in the true union that will meld us all!”

name: Hezrou
effect: Move an enemy troop.
Promote the top card of your deck.
flavour: Their stench is legendary.

name: Derro
effect: Supplant a white troop anywhere on the board. You recruit an Insane Outcast.
flavour: “I've got a shiny, sharpie, steely stick ready to poke a hole in your nice, nibbly noggin.”

name: Myconid Sovereign
effect: Choose an opponent. He or she recruits an Insane Outcast.
At end of turn, promote another card played this turn.
flavour: “The day of joy is nigh!”

name: Ghoul
effect: +2 power
Each opponent recruits an Insane Outcast.
flavour: A favored minion of the Prince of Undeath.

name: Ettin
effect: Choose one:
• Deploy 3 troops.
• Assassinate 2 white troops.
flavour: Mug was partial to elf meat. Tug liked dwarf, when he could get it, but elf, not so much.

name: Jackalwere
effect: Choose one:
• Place a spy.
• Return one of your spies ▶ +2 power +2 influence
flavour: They capture victims for their lamia masters, who mercilessly condemn those victims to slavery or death.

name: Glabrezu
effect: Devour a card in your hand ▶ Assassinate 2 troops.
flavour: Only when they behold a glabrezu's true form do mortals realize the folly of succumbing to its whispers of power.

name: Succubus
effect: Devour a card in your hand ▶ Place a spy, then assassinate a troop at that spy's site.
flavour: Seducers and corruptors, they have found easy prey in the world of mortals.

name: Nalfeshnee
effect: +3 influence
Promote the top card of your deck.
flavour: “There is always room at our table for ambitious souls.”

name: Vrock
effect: Choose one:
• Place a spy.
• Return one of your spies ▶ +5 power
flavour: Vrocks are difficult to bribe, seeing no reason to bargain when they can simply take what they want.

name: Graz'zt
effect: Choose one:
• Place 2 spies.
• Return any number of your spies ▶ Supplant a troop at each of the returned spies' sites.
flavour: His beauty hides a heart of blackest evil.

name: Zuggtmoy
effect: Devour a card in your inner circle ▶ +3 influence and at end of turn, promote up to 2 other cards played this turn.
flavour: “I have come for my betrothed.” —Zuggtmoy to Araumycos

name: Balor
effect: Devour a card in your hand ▶ Supplant a white troop anywhere on the board. Then deploy a troop.
flavour: The thunder of its whip is enough to drain the resolve of the most hardened warriors.

name: Marilith
effect: Devour a card in your hand ▶ +5 power
flavour: They sing an Abyssal hymn as they lead the demonic hordes to battle.

name: Demogorgon
effect: Devour a card in your hand ▶ Supplant 2 white troops. Each opponent recruits 2 Insane Outcasts.
flavour: Madness and rage fueled by mindless evil.

name: Orcus
effect: Devour a card in your hand ▶ Assassinate 2 troops. Then you may take up to 2 troops from any trophy halls and deploy them anywhere on the board.
flavour: Death is only the beginning of his depravity.
